content: What are the root cause of the OIL price drop today?

args.thought: User asks about root cause of oil price drop today (March 31, 2026). From chat context, oil was quoted at WTI $104.69 and Brent $104.50/bbl. I need to: 1) Verify current oil price and confirm if there was actually a drop today, 2) Search for today's oil-related news to identify catalysts, 3) Cross-reference with Iran war developments since that's the dominant geopolitical driver. I'll start by getting current market data and recent news.

+ 769.00 # Crude oil futures rise despite report of Trump weighing end to Iran war ## At 9.27 am on Tuesday, June Brent oil futures were at $107.49, up by 0.09%, and May crude oil futures on WTI were at $103.05, up by 0.17% Updated - March 31, 2026 at 09:44 AM.

### Share   ...    https://www.thehindubusinessline.com/markets/commodities/crude-oil-futures-rise-despite-report-of-trump-weighing-end-to   ...    Crude oil futures traded lower on Tuesday morning as a report in Wall Street Journal said US President Donald Trump is considering ending the war with Iran. At 9.27 am on Tuesday, June Brent oil futures were at $107.49, up by 0.09 per cent, and May crude oil futures on WTI (West Texas Intermediate) were at $103.05, up by 0.17 per cent. A report in Wall Street Journal, which cited officials from the US administration, said Trump told his aides he is willing to end the military campaign against Iran even if the Strait of Hormuz remains largely closed. The report said Trump and his aides assessed that a mission to pry open the chokepoint would push the conflict beyond his timeline of   ...    He decided that the US should achieve its main goals of hobbling Iran’s navy and its missile stocks and wind down current hostilities while pressuring Iran diplomatically to resume the free flow of trade. If that fails, US would press allies in Europe and the Gulf to take the lead on reopening the strait, the report said citing the officials. Meanwhile, Iran attacked the Kuwait-flagged ‌Al-Salmi crude oil tanker off Dubai on Monday. The tanker can carry around 2 million barrels of oil. A Reuters report, which quoted the ship’s owner Kuwait Petroleum Corporation, said work was   ...    Published on March 31, 2026

results.title: Oil price volatile as it heads for record monthly rise
results.author: Martin Strydom
highlights:
Oil price still rising as war in Iran shows no sign of abating   ...    ## The Middle East conflict has sent shockwaves through global energy markets. Brent crude surged over 43 per cent in   ...    Oil prices recorded their biggest monthly gain in history after the Iran war plunged energy markets into crisis. Brent crude, the global benchmark, rose 63.3 per cent over March, from less than $73 a barrel at the end of February to trade at $118.35 on Tuesday night, up 4.9 per cent on the day, and 94.5 per cent higher since the start of the year. Brent rose as much as 6 per cent at one stage on Tuesday, almost matching the highest prices seen so far during the crisis, after Iran attacked a tanker off the coast of the United Arab Emirates. The monthly gain, in both dollar and percentage terms, tops the 46 per cent increase in September 1990 during the first Gulf war. The US-Israeli attacks on Iran have resulted in Tehran retaliating by effectively shutting down the Strait of Hormuz, a   ...    Advertisement

Prior to the conflict, oil prices had been subdued by predictions of a looming global supply glut. However the loss of shipments through the strait has caused what the International Energy Agency has described as “the largest supply disruption in the history of the global oil market”. The IEA responded by co-ordinating the biggest-ever release of emergency oil stocks, but the move, which it admitted was a “stop-gap measure”, has done little to ease prices as the conflict drags on. - Iran war latest: Trump tells Britain to ‘get your own oil’ Oil markets have experienced extreme volatility as prices whipsaw within hours some days on commentary out of the US and Iran. On Tuesday, oil prices initially fell after President Trump reportedly said that he would be willing to end the   ...
